mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMTNENTRPRSMBER ( ESNTL_ID , PROJECT_ID , ENTRPRS_MBER_ID , ENTRPRS_SE_CODE , BIZRNO , INSTT_ID , JURIRNO , CMPNY_NM , DEPT_NM , CXFC , ZIP , ADRES , ENTRPRS_MIDDLE_TELNO , FXNUM , INDUTY_CODE , APPLCNT_NM , SBSCRB_DE , ENTRPRS_MBER_STTUS , ENTRPRS_MBER_PASSWORD , ENTRPRS_MBER_PASSWORD_HINT , ENTRPRS_MBER_PASSWORD_CNSR , GROUP_ID , DETAIL_ADRES , ENTRPRS_END_TELNO , AREA_NO , APPLCNT_EMAIL_ADRES , APPLCNT_IHIDNUM , CHG_PWD_LAST_PNTTM , MARKETING_YN , AUTH_TY , AUTH_DN , AUTH_CI , AUTH_DI , AUTH_EMAIL , BIZ_REG_FILE_PATH ) VALUES ( #{uniqId}, #{projectId}, #{entrprsmberId}, #{entrprsSeCode}, #{bizrno}, #{insttId}, #{jurirno}, #{cmpnyNm}, #{deptNm}, #{cxfc}, #{zip}, #{adres}, #{entrprsMiddleTelno}, #{fxnum}, #{indutyCode}, #{applcntNm}, SYSDATETIME, #{entrprsMberSttus}, #{entrprsMberPassword}, #{entrprsMberPasswordHint}, #{entrprsMberPasswordCnsr}, #{groupId}, #{detailAdres}, #{entrprsEndTelno}, #{areaNo}, #{applcntEmailAdres}, #{applcntIhidnum}, SYSDATETIME, #{marketingYn}, #{authTy}, #{authDn}, #{authCi}, #{authDi}, #{authEmail} , #{bizRegFilePath} )

INSERT INTO COMTNENTRPRSMBERFILE ( FILE_ID, ENTRPRS_MBER_ID, FILE_SN, STRE_FILE_NM, ORIGNL_FILE_NM, FILE_STRE_PATH, FILE_MG, FILE_EXTSN, FILE_CN, REGIST_PNTTM ) VALUES ( #{fileId}, #{entrprsmberId}, #{fileSn}, #{streFileNm}, #{orignlFileNm}, #{fileStrePath}, #{fileMg}, #{fileExtsn}, #{fileCn}, SYSDATETIME )
mapper.select:
SELECT ESNTL_ID uniqId, 'USR02' userTy, ENTRPRS_MBER_ID entrprsmberId, ENTRPRS_SE_CODE entrprsSeCode, BIZRNO bizrno, INSTT_ID insttId, JURIRNO jurirno, CMPNY_NM cmpnyNm, DEPT_NM deptNm, CXFC cxfc, ZIP zip, ADRES adres, ENTRPRS_MIDDLE_TELNO entrprsMiddleTelno, FXNUM fxnum, INDUTY_CODE indutyCode, APPLCNT_NM applcntNm, SBSCRB_DE sbscrbDe, ENTRPRS_MBER_STTUS entrprsMberSttus, ENTRPRS_MBER_PASSWORD entrprsMberPassword, ENTRPRS_MBER_PASSWORD_HINT entrprsMberPasswordHint, ENTRPRS_MBER_PASSWORD_CNSR entrprsMberPasswordCnsr, GROUP_ID groupId, DETAIL_ADRES detailAdres, ENTRPRS_END_TELNO entrprsEndTelno, AREA_NO areaNo, APPLCNT_IHIDNUM applcntIhidnum, APPLCNT_EMAIL_ADRES applcntEmailAdres, MARKETING_YN marketingYn, AUTH_TY authTy, AUTH_DN authDn, AUTH_CI authCi, AUTH_DI authDi, AUTH_EMAIL authEmail, BIZ_REG_FILE_PATH bizRegFilePath, RJCT_RSN rjctRsn, TO_CHAR(RJCT_PNTTM, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI:SS') rjctPnttm, LOCK_AT lockAt FROM COMTNENTRPRSMBER WHERE ESNTL_ID=#{uniqId}
AND PROJECT_ID = #{projectId}

SELECT ESNTL_ID uniqId, 'USR02' userTy, ENTRPRS_MBER_ID entrprsmberId, ENTRPRS_SE_CODE entrprsSeCode, BIZRNO bizrno, INSTT_ID insttId, JURIRNO jurirno, CMPNY_NM cmpnyNm, DEPT_NM deptNm, CXFC cxfc, ZIP zip, ADRES adres, ENTRPRS_MIDDLE_TELNO entrprsMiddleTelno, FXNUM fxnum, INDUTY_CODE indutyCode, APPLCNT_NM applcntNm, SBSCRB_DE sbscrbDe, ENTRPRS_MBER_STTUS entrprsMberSttus, ENTRPRS_MBER_PASSWORD entrprsMberPassword, ENTRPRS_MBER_PASSWORD_HINT entrprsMberPasswordHint, ENTRPRS_MBER_PASSWORD_CNSR entrprsMberPasswordCnsr, GROUP_ID groupId, DETAIL_ADRES detailAdres, ENTRPRS_END_TELNO entrprsEndTelno, AREA_NO areaNo, APPLCNT_IHIDNUM applcntIhidnum, APPLCNT_EMAIL_ADRES applcntEmailAdres, MARKETING_YN marketingYn, AUTH_TY authTy, AUTH_DN authDn, AUTH_CI authCi, AUTH_DI authDi, AUTH_EMAIL authEmail, BIZ_REG_FILE_PATH bizRegFilePath, RJCT_RSN rjctRsn, TO_CHAR(RJCT_PNTTM, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI:SS') rjctPnttm, LOCK_AT lockAt FROM COMTNENTRPRSMBER WHERE ENTRPRS_MBER_ID=#{entrprsmberId}
AND PROJECT_ID = #{projectId}
SELECT USE_STPLAT_ID , USE_STPLAT_CN , INFO_PROVD_AGRE_CN FROM COMTNSTPLATINFO WHERE USE_STPLAT_ID=#{stplatId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMTNINSTTINFO ( INSTT_ID, PROJECT_ID, INSTT_NM, ENTRPRS_SE_CODE, REPRSNT_NM, BIZRNO, ZIP, ADRES, DETAIL_ADRES, BIZ_REG_FILE_PATH, INSTT_STTUS, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, CHARGER_NM, CHARGER_EMAIL, CHARGER_TEL ) VALUES ( #{insttId}, #{projectId}, #{insttNm}, #{entrprsSeCode}, #{reprsntNm}, #{bizrno}, #{zip}, #{adres}, #{detailAdres}, #{bizRegFilePath}, #{insttSttus}, SYSDATETIME, SYSDATETIME, #{chargerNm}, #{chargerEmail}, #{chargerTel} )

INSERT INTO COMTNINSTTFILE ( FILE_ID, INSTT_ID, FILE_SN, STRE_FILE_NM, ORIGNL_FILE_NM, FILE_STRE_PATH, FILE_MG, FILE_EXTSN, FILE_CN, REGIST_PNTTM ) VALUES ( #{fileId}, #{insttId}, #{fileSn}, #{streFileNm}, #{orignlFileNm}, #{fileStrePath}, #{fileMg}, #{fileExtsn}, #{fileCn}, SYSDATETIME )
mapper.update: UPDATE COMTNENTRPRSMBER SET LOCK_AT = NULL , LOCK_CNT = NULL , LOCK_LAST_PNTTM = NULL WHERE ESNTL_ID = #{uniqId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMTNEMPLYRSCRTYESTBS (SCRTY_DTRMN_TRGET_ID, MBER_TY_CODE, AUTHOR_CODE) SELECT #{value}, 'USR02', 'ROLE_USER' FROM db_root WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM COMTNEMPLYRSCRTYESTBS WHERE SCRTY_DTRMN_TRGET_ID = #{value} )

INSERT INTO MSATNEMPLYRSCRTYESTBS (SCRTY_DTRMN_TRGET_ID, MBER_TY_CODE, AUTHOR_CODE) SELECT #{value}, 'USR02', 'ROLE_USER' FROM db_root WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSATNEMPLYRSCRTYESTBS WHERE SCRTY_DTRMN_TRGET_ID = #{value} )
